puzzles.label: Knight Fork K+Q
puzzles.hint: Knight to f5 — forks king on e7 and queen on g7!

puzzles.label: Knight Fork K+R
puzzles.hint: Knight to f7 — forks king on d8 and rook on h8!

puzzles.label: Back Rank Mate
puzzles.hint: Rook to d8 — checkmate on the back rank.

puzzles.label: Smothered Mate
puzzles.hint: Knight to f7 — king trapped by its own pieces.

puzzles.label: Rook Skewer
puzzles.hint: Rook takes queen — king flees, then we go for checkmate.

puzzles.label: Queen Corner
puzzles.hint: Queen to g7 — king cannot escape.

puzzles.label: Rook Mate
puzzles.hint: Rook to h8 — king and rook deliver mate.

puzzles.label: Queen Back Rank
puzzles.hint: Queen to d8 — the decisive blow.
